Name: North Bay 9 Full Occupancy
Description: When Bay 9 is fully occupied, the system shall keep Bays 8 and 10 available, displaying no “Wait” messages
Acceptance Criteria: When North Bay 9 is fully occupied:

Acceptance Criteria: 1. Bays 8 and 10 remain available
